display_text: Third Eye, Tier N/A: Non-purchasable item providing True Sight vision in a 500 radius around its carrier. Grants +300 bonus vision and +7 to all attributes. Contains 3 charges; loses a charge upon death and is destroyed when all charges are consumed. Provides no active abilities. Stats: +7 All Stats, Bonus Vision: 300, True Sight Radius: 500.
